title: Decomposable Nether Wart
description: Allows you to decompose a nether wart block
body:
This mod lets you decompose a nether wart block!

# Why do you need to do that?
Well, iron, gold, diamond and netherite let you put it in the crafting table and give you 9 of that said material.

# Why does Nether Wart need to be in that category?
Because Nether Wart can be used for making potions.

# What is the recipe?
One Nether Wart Block anywhere.

This was made with MCreator. Download it [here](https://mcreator.net/).
